'''ngathoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deadhang|deadhang]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-th-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deadhang|deadhang]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngathoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngætheyeth|ngætheyeth]] || [[word:ngætheyej|ngætheyej]] || [[word:ngætheyesh|ngætheyesh]] || [[word:ngætheye|ngætheye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngathothoyoth|ngathothoyoth]] || [[word:ngathothoyoj|ngathothoyoj]] || [[word:ngathothoyosh|ngathothoyosh]] || [[word:ngathothoyo|ngathothoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngathoyoth|ngathoyoth]] || [[word:ngathoyoj|ngathoyoj]] || [[word:ngathoyosh|ngathoyosh]] || [[word:ngathoyo|ngathoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngathofyoth|ngathofyoth]] || [[word:ngathofyoj|ngathofyoj]] || [[word:ngathofyosh|ngathofyosh]] || [[word:ngathofyof|ngathofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngathoyotho|ngathoyotho]] || [[word:ngathoyojo|ngathoyojo]] || [[word:ngathoyosho|ngathoyosho]] || [[word:ngathoyoko|ngathoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngathoyoth|ngathoyoth]] || [[word:ngathoyoj|ngathoyoj]] || [[word:ngathoyosh|ngathoyosh]] || [[word:ngathoyo|ngathoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngathoyothol|ngathoyothol]] || [[word:ngathoyojol|ngathoyojol]] || [[word:ngathoyoshol|ngathoyoshol]] || [[word:ngathoyokol|ngathoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngathoyothotho|ngathoyothotho]] || [[word:ngathoyojojo|ngathoyojojo]] || [[word:ngathoyoshosho|ngathoyoshosho]] || [[word:ngathoyoko|ngathoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngathoyothon|ngathoyothon]] || [[word:ngathoyojon|ngathoyojon]] || [[word:ngathoyoshon|ngathoyoshon]] || [[word:ngathoyokon|ngathoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngathoyothoro|ngathoyothoro]] || [[word:ngathoyojoro|ngathoyojoro]] || [[word:ngathoyoshoro|ngathoyoshoro]] || [[word:ngathoyokoro|ngathoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
